item.name: Spriggan Stonecarrier Horn
item.description: The plangent honking of this horn summons your spriggan stonecarrier, eager to hoist you aloft and scamper away.

mount.name: Spriggan Stonecarrier
mount.action: Summon forth your spriggan stonecarrier. Lives to carry ore, eggs, and you.
mount.description: Grown to a prodigious size by virtue of its appetite, this spriggan was choking on a chunk of ore when it was found and saved by a band of miners. Seeking to repay the kindness of men, it took to carrying their burdens, which apparently includes men themselves.
mount.tooltip:
It must be so tiring living
each day carrying around
a brain of solid stone.
- Da Za
